    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    A

    addConstraint(Constraint) - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.CSPProblem
    Adds a constraint to the problem.
    addRule(SudokuRule) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.Sudoku
    Registers a new rule to apply.
    addRules(List) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.Sudoku
    Registers multiple new rules to apply.
    addValue(String, int) - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.DomainStore
    Adds a specific value to the domain of the given variable.
    addVariable(String, Set) - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.CSPProblem
    Adds a variable to the domain store.
    addVariable(String, Set) - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.DomainStore
    Adds a new variable with its corresponding domain to the store.
    addVariables(Map) - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.DomainStore
    Adds all variables and their corresponding domains from a given map to this store.
    addVariables(DomainStore) - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.DomainStore
    Adds all variables and their corresponding domains from another DomainStore to this store.
    affectedCells(Sudoku) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.SudokuRule
    Identifies and returns all board cells that are actively constrained by this specific rule.
    allAssigned() - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.DomainStore
    Checks if all variables in the store have been assigned a single value (i.e., their domains are singletons).
    AllDifferentConstraint - Class in sudokusolver.csp.constraints
    Ensures that no two variables in the constraint's scope hold the same value.
    AllDifferentConstraint(String...) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.csp.constraints.AllDifferentConstraint
     
    AllDifferentConstraint(List) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.csp.constraints.AllDifferentConstraint
     
    AllDifferentRule - Class in sudokusolver.sudoku.rules
    Enforces the set of cells to hold different values.
    AllDifferentRule(List) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.AllDifferentRule
     
    AllDifferentRule(Set) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.AllDifferentRule
     
    AllDifferentRule(Cell...) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.AllDifferentRule
     
    AllEqualConstraint - Class in sudokusolver.csp.constraints
    Ensures that all variables in the constraint's scope hold the same value.
    AllEqualConstraint(String...) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.csp.constraints.AllEqualConstraint
     
    AllEqualConstraint(List) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.csp.constraints.AllEqualConstraint
     
    AllEqualRule - Class in sudokusolver.sudoku.rules
    Enforces the set of cells to hold the same value.
    AllEqualRule(List) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.AllEqualRule
     
    AllEqualRule(Set) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.AllEqualRule
     
    AllEqualRule(Cell...) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.AllEqualRule
     
    allowedPairs - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.AllowedPairsRule
     
    AllowedPairsConstraint - Class in sudokusolver.csp.constraints
    Enforces that the values of two variables belong to a specified set of allowed pairs.
    AllowedPairsConstraint(String, String, Set) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.csp.constraints.AllowedPairsConstraint
     
    AllowedPairsConstraint(List, Set) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.csp.constraints.AllowedPairsConstraint
     
    AllowedPairsRule - Class in sudokusolver.sudoku.rules
    Enforces that the values of two cells belong to a specified set of allowed pairs.
    AllowedPairsRule(Cell, Cell, Set) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.AllowedPairsRule
     
    allowedValues - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.AllowedValuesRule
     
    AllowedValuesConstraint - Class in sudokusolver.csp.constraints
    Ensures that each variable in the constraint's scope holds a value from a specified set of allowed values.
    AllowedValuesConstraint(List, Set) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.csp.constraints.AllowedValuesConstraint
     
    AllowedValuesRule - Class in sudokusolver.sudoku.rules
    Enforces that the values of a set of cells belong to a specified set of allowed values.
    AllowedValuesRule(List, List) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.AllowedValuesRule
     
    AllowedValuesRule(Set, Set) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.AllowedValuesRule
     
    AntiKnightRule - Class in sudokusolver.sudoku.rules
    Enforces that no two cells a knight's move apart can have the same value.
    AntiKnightRule() - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.AntiKnightRule
    Applies the rule to all cells in the Sudoku grid.
    AntiKnightRule(List) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.AntiKnightRule
     
    AntiKnightRule(Set) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.AntiKnightRule
     
    AntiKnightRule(Cell...) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.AntiKnightRule
     
    apply(Sudoku) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.AllDifferentRule
     
    apply(Sudoku) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.AllEqualRule
     
    apply(Sudoku) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.AllowedPairsRule
     
    apply(Sudoku) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.AllowedValuesRule
     
    apply(Sudoku) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.AntiKnightRule
     
    apply(Sudoku) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.ClassicRule
     
    apply(Sudoku) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.ConsecutiveRule
     
    apply(Sudoku) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.DiagonalRule
     
    apply(Sudoku) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.DotsRule
     
    apply(Sudoku) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.EvenRule
     
    apply(Sudoku) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.KillerCageRule
     
    apply(Sudoku) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.OddRule
     
    apply(Sudoku) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.PalindromeRule
     
    apply(Sudoku) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.RowsAndColumnsRule
     
    apply(Sudoku) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.ThermoRule
     
    apply(Sudoku) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.XVRule
     
    apply(Sudoku) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.SudokuRule
    Translates this high-level Sudoku rule into a set of lower-level CSP constraints bound to the current game configuration.
    AscendingConstraint - Class in sudokusolver.csp.constraints
    Ensures that the values of the variables in the constraint's scope are in strictly ascending order.
    AscendingConstraint(String...) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.csp.constraints.AscendingConstraint
     
    AscendingConstraint(List) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.csp.constraints.AscendingConstraint
     
    assignValue(String, int) - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.DomainStore
    Assigns a specific value to the variable by reducing its domain to a singleton set containing only that value.

    B

    blackDots - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.DotsRule
    Edges with black dots.
    Board - Class in sudokusolver.sudoku
    Represents a Sudoku board which is a grid of cells, where each cell can have an assigned value, be empty, or be outside the puzzle.
    Board() - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.Board
    Initializes an empty board.
    Board(String) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.Board
    Initializes the board from a string representation.
    Board(List) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.Board
    Initializes the board with a 2D list of integers, where each inner list represents a row of the Sudoku grid.
    Board(Map) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.Board
    Initializes the board with a map of cell coordinates involved in the puzzle to their values or 0 for empty cells.
    buildCSPProblem() - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.Sudoku
    Compiles the Sudoku object into a CSPProblem.

    C

    Cell - Record Class in sudokusolver.sudoku
    Represents a single cell coordinate on the Sudoku board defined by its row and column.
    Cell(int, int) - Constructor for record class sudokusolver.sudoku.Cell
    Creates an instance of a Cell record class.
    Cell(String) - Constructor for record class sudokusolver.sudoku.Cell
    Constructs a Cell by parsing its string representation.
    cells - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.AllDifferentRule
     
    cells - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.AllEqualRule
     
    cells - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.AllowedValuesRule
     
    cells - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.AntiKnightRule
    The set of cells to which the rule applies.
    cells - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.ConsecutiveRule
    The set of cells to which the rule applies.
    cells - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.DotsRule
    The set of cells to which the rule applies.
    cells - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.EvenRule
    The set of cells to which the rule applies.
    cells - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.KillerCageRule
    The set of cells to which the rule applies.
    cells - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.OddRule
    The set of cells to which the rule applies.
    cells - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.PalindromeRule
    The list of cells to which the rule applies.
    cells - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.ThermoRule
     
    cells - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.XVRule
    The set of cells to which the rule applies.
    ClassicRule - Class in sudokusolver.sudoku.rules
    Enforces the classic Sudoku rules for a square region.
    ClassicRule(int, int) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.ClassicRule
     
    ClassicRule(int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.ClassicRule
     
    ClassicRule(Cell, int, int) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.ClassicRule
     
    col() - Method in record class sudokusolver.sudoku.Cell
    Returns the value of the col record component.
    col() - Method in record class sudokusolver.sudoku.Corner
    Returns the value of the col record component.
    col() - Method in record class sudokusolver.sudoku.Edge
    Returns the value of the col record component.
    ConsecutiveRule - Class in sudokusolver.sudoku.rules
    Enforces that the values of cells connected by an edge are consecutive (differ by 1) only if the edge is marked as consecutive, and not consecutive otherwise.
    ConsecutiveRule(List) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.ConsecutiveRule
     
    ConsecutiveRule(List, List) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.ConsecutiveRule
     
    ConsecutiveRule(Set) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.ConsecutiveRule
     
    ConsecutiveRule(Set, Set) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.ConsecutiveRule
     
    Constraint - Class in sudokusolver.csp
    Represents a generic constraint in the Constraint Satisfaction Problem (CSP).
    Constraint(String...) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.csp.Constraint
    Constructs a constraint with a varargs array of participating variables.
    Constraint(List) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.csp.Constraint
    Constructs a constraint with a list of participating variables.
    constraints - Variable in class sudokusolver.csp.CSPProblem
    The list of constraints applied to this problem.
    containsVariable(String) - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.DomainStore
    Checks if the store contains a domain for the specified variable.
    Contradiction - Enum constant in enum class sudokusolver.csp.PropagationResult
    A contradiction was found during propagation, meaning the current partial assignment cannot lead to a valid solution.
    copy() - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.Board
     
    copyDomains() - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.DomainStore
    Copies the domains of all variables in the store.
    Corner - Record Class in sudokusolver.sudoku
    Represents a precise grid intersection (vertex) where four adjacent cells meet.
    Corner(int, int) - Constructor for record class sudokusolver.sudoku.Corner
    Creates an instance of a Corner record class.
    CSPProblem - Class in sudokusolver.csp
    Represents a constraint satisfaction problem, consisting of a domain store and a list of constraints.
    CSPProblem(DomainStore, List) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.csp.CSPProblem
    Constructs a new CSPProblem with a given domain store and constraints.
    CSPSolver - Class in sudokusolver.csp
    A static utility class that implements a solving algorithm for Constraint Satisfaction Problems (CSPs).

    D

    deepCopy() - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.DomainStore
    Creates a deep copy of this DomainStore, including independent copies of all variable domains.
    deleteVariable(String) - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.CSPProblem
    Deletes a variable from the domain store and removes all constraints that reference it.
    deleteVariable(String) - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.DomainStore
    Deletes a variable and its corresponding domain from the store.
    DiagonalRule - Class in sudokusolver.sudoku.rules
    Enforces that the values on both main diagonals of a square region are distinct.
    DiagonalRule(int) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.DiagonalRule
     
    DiagonalRule(int, int, int) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.DiagonalRule
     
    DiagonalRule(Cell, int) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.DiagonalRule
     
    domains - Variable in class sudokusolver.csp.DomainStore
    The map storing the domains for each variable.
    domainStore - Variable in class sudokusolver.csp.CSPProblem
    The store containing variables and their respective domains.
    DomainStore - Class in sudokusolver.csp
    A class representing the store for variable domains in a Constraint Satisfaction Problem.
    DomainStore() - Constructor for class sudokusolver.csp.DomainStore
    Initializes an empty domain store.
    DomainStore(Map) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.csp.DomainStore
    Initializes the domain store with a given map of variable domains.
    DotsRule - Class in sudokusolver.sudoku.rules
    Enforces that the values of cells connected by a white dot edge differ by 1, the values of cells connected by a black dot edge differ by a factor of 2, and the values of cells not connected by a white or black dot edge are not consecutive and do not differ by a factor of 2.
    DotsRule(List, List) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.DotsRule
     
    DotsRule(List, List, List) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.DotsRule
     
    DotsRule(Set, Set, Set) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.DotsRule
     

    E

    Edge - Record Class in sudokusolver.sudoku
    Represents a grid edge positioned between adjacent cells on the Sudoku board.
    Edge(int, int, boolean) - Constructor for record class sudokusolver.sudoku.Edge
    Creates an instance of a Edge record class.
    edges - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.ConsecutiveRule
    The set of edges separating cells with consecutive values.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class sudokusolver.csp.ValuePair
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class sudokusolver.sudoku.Cell
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class sudokusolver.sudoku.Corner
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class sudokusolver.sudoku.Edge
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    EvenRule - Class in sudokusolver.sudoku.rules
    Enforces that specified cells can only obtain even values.
    EvenRule(List) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.EvenRule
     
    EvenRule(Set) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.EvenRule

    first - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.AllowedPairsRule
     
    first() - Method in record class sudokusolver.csp.ValuePair
    Returns the value of the first record component.
    fromStringMap(Map) - Static method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.Board
    Creates a Board instance from a map of cell coordinates to their values or 0 for empty cells.

    G

    getAllowedPairs() - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.constraints.AllowedPairsConstraint
     
    getAllowedValues() - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.constraints.AllowedValuesConstraint
     
    getAssignment() - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.DomainStore
    Returns a map representing the current assignment of values to variables.
    getCellRegion(char) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.RegionSelector
    Returns the list of cells in the region represented by the character c.
    getCellRegion(String) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.RegionSelector
    Returns the list of cells in the regions represented by the characters in the string s.
    getCells() - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.Board
    Returns a set of all cells involved in the puzzle.
    getCells() - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.Sudoku
    Returns a set of all cells involved in the puzzle.
    getCellValue(int, int) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.Sudoku
    Number assigned to given cell, 0 if the cell is unassigned, or -1 if the cell is not involved in the puzzle.
    getCellValue(Cell) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.Sudoku
    Number assigned to given cell, 0 if the cell is unassigned, or -1 if the cell is not involved in the puzzle.
    getConstraintsForVariable(String) - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.CSPProblem
    Finds all constraints that apply to a specific variable.
    getCornerRegion(char) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.RegionSelector
    Returns the list of corners in the region represented by the character c.
    getCornerRegion(String) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.RegionSelector
    Returns the list of corners in the regions represented by the characters in the string s.
    getDomain(String) - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.DomainStore
    Returns the domain for the specified variable.
    getEdgeRegion(char) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.RegionSelector
    Returns the list of edges in the region represented by the character c.
    getEdgeRegion(String) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.RegionSelector
    Returns the list of edges in the regions represented by the characters in the string s.
    getMaxNumber() - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.Sudoku
    Returns the upper number limit for valid values in the puzzle.
    getSum() - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.constraints.SumConstraint
     
    getVariables() - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.Constraint
    Returns the unmodifiable list of variables constrained by this instance.
    getVariables() - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.CSPProblem
    Retrieves all variables present in the domain store.
    getVariables() - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.DomainStore
    Returns the set of variables stored in this DomainStore.

    H

    hashCode() - Method in record class sudokusolver.csp.ValuePair
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    hashCode() - Method in record class sudokusolver.sudoku.Cell
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    hashCode() - Method in record class sudokusolver.sudoku.Corner
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    hashCode() - Method in record class sudokusolver.sudoku.Edge
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    height - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.RowsAndColumnsRule
    The height of the rectangle.

    I

    isValid() - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.CSPProblem
    Checks if constraints only refer to variables defined in the domain store.
    isVertical() - Method in record class sudokusolver.sudoku.Edge
    Returns the value of the isVertical record component.

    K

    KillerCageRule - Class in sudokusolver.sudoku.rules
    Enforces that the values in a specified set of cells must sum to a given value.
    KillerCageRule(int, List) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.KillerCageRule
     
    KillerCageRule(int, Set) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.KillerCageRule
     
    KillerCageRule(int, Cell...) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.KillerCageRule
     

    M

    maxAssignedValue() - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.Board
     

    O

    OddRule - Class in sudokusolver.sudoku.rules
    Enforces that specified cells can only obtain odd values.
    OddRule(List) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.OddRule
     
    OddRule(Set) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.OddRule
     

    P

    PalindromeRule - Class in sudokusolver.sudoku.rules
    Enforces that the values in a specified list of cells form a palindrome, meaning that the k-th cell in the list must have the same value as the k-th cell from the end of the list for all k.
    PalindromeRule(List) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.PalindromeRule
     
    PalindromeRule(Cell...) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.PalindromeRule
     
    propagate(List) - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.Constraint
    Executes the constraint propagation logic to prune the domains of the scoped variables.
    propagate(List) - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.constraints.AllDifferentConstraint
     
    propagate(List) - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.constraints.AllEqualConstraint
     
    propagate(List) - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.constraints.AllowedPairsConstraint
     
    propagate(List) - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.constraints.AllowedValuesConstraint
     
    propagate(List) - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.constraints.AscendingConstraint
     
    propagate(List) - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.constraints.SumConstraint
     
    PropagationResult - Enum Class in sudokusolver.csp
    Represents the outcome of a constraint propagation step.

    R

    rectangle(int, int, int, int) - Static method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.RegionSelector
    Returns the list of cells in the rectangle defined by the top-left corner (topRow, leftCol) and the bottom-right corner (bottomRow, rightCol).
    rectangle(Cell, Cell) - Static method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.RegionSelector
    Returns the list of cells in the rectangle defined by the top-left corner and the bottom-right corner.
    Reduced - Enum constant in enum class sudokusolver.csp.PropagationResult
    No contradiction was detected, and the constraint cannot yet be definitively marked as permanently satisfied.
    regionHeight - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.ClassicRule
    The regions' height.
    RegionSelector - Class in sudokusolver.sudoku
    A parser designed to map ASCII-art grid representations into lists of cells, edges, and corners grouped by character identifiers.
    RegionSelector(String) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.RegionSelector
    Constructs a RegionSelector by parsing the provided ASCII-art string with top-left corner as the origin (0,0) in cells-only mode.
    RegionSelector(String, boolean) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.RegionSelector
    Constructs a RegionSelector by parsing the provided ASCII-art string with top-left corner as the origin (0,0).
    RegionSelector(String, int, int) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.RegionSelector
    Constructs a RegionSelector by parsing the provided ASCII-art string in cells-only mode.
    RegionSelector(String, int, int, boolean) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.RegionSelector
    Constructs a RegionSelector by parsing the provided ASCII-art string.
    RegionSelector(String, Cell) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.RegionSelector
    Constructs a RegionSelector by parsing the provided ASCII-art string in cells-only mode.
    RegionSelector(String, Cell, boolean) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.RegionSelector
    Constructs a RegionSelector by parsing the provided ASCII-art string.
    regionWidth - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.ClassicRule
    The regions' width.
    removeValue(String, int) - Method in class sudokusolver.csp.DomainStore
    Removes a specific value from the domain of the given variable.
    row() - Method in record class sudokusolver.sudoku.Cell
    Returns the value of the row record component.
    row() - Method in record class sudokusolver.sudoku.Corner
    Returns the value of the row record component.
    row() - Method in record class sudokusolver.sudoku.Edge
    Returns the value of the row record component.
    RowsAndColumnsRule - Class in sudokusolver.sudoku.rules
    Enforces that the values in each row and column of a specified rectangle must be distinct.
    RowsAndColumnsRule(int) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.RowsAndColumnsRule
     
    RowsAndColumnsRule(int, int) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.RowsAndColumnsRule
     
    RowsAndColumnsRule(int, int, int) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.RowsAndColumnsRule
     
    RowsAndColumnsRule(int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.RowsAndColumnsRule
     
    RowsAndColumnsRule(Cell, int) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.RowsAndColumnsRule
     
    RowsAndColumnsRule(Cell, int, int) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.RowsAndColumnsRule
     
    rules - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.Sudoku
    The active list of rules applied to this puzzle instance.

    S

    Satisfied - Enum constant in enum class sudokusolver.csp.PropagationResult
    The constraint is guaranteed to be satisfied under the current domain states.
    second - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.AllowedPairsRule
     
    second() - Method in record class sudokusolver.csp.ValuePair
    Returns the value of the second record component.
    sequence(int, int, int, int, int) - Static method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.RegionSelector
    Returns the list of cells in the sequence defined by the starting cell (startRow, startCol) and the direction (dr, dc) for the given length.
    sequence(Cell, int, int, int) - Static method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.RegionSelector
    Returns the list of cells in the sequence defined by the starting cell (start) and the direction (dr, dc) for the given length.
    setMaxNumber(int) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.Sudoku
    Sets the upper number limit for valid values in the puzzle.
    solve() - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.Sudoku
    Finds solutions (max 2) to this Sudoku puzzle by compiling it into a CSPProblem, invoking the CSPSolver and translating the resulting variable assignments back into Board objects.
    solve(int) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.Sudoku
    Finds solutions to this Sudoku puzzle by compiling it into a CSPProblem, invoking the CSPSolver and translating the resulting variable assignments back into Board objects.
    solve(CSPProblem, int) - Static method in class sudokusolver.csp.CSPSolver
    Solves the given CSP problem and returns a list of solutions, where each solution is a mapping of variable names to their assigned values.
    Sudoku - Class in sudokusolver.sudoku
    Represents a complete Sudoku puzzle instance, serving as the main entry point and orchestrator for puzzle configuration and solving.
    Sudoku(String) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.Sudoku
    Constructs a Sudoku instance from an ASCII-art string with an empty rules list and upper number limit set to 9.
    Sudoku(String, int) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.Sudoku
    Constructs a Sudoku instance from an ASCII-art string with an empty rules list.
    Sudoku(String, int, List) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.Sudoku
    Constructs a Sudoku instance by parsing an ASCII-art string.
    Sudoku(Board) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.Sudoku
    Constructs a Sudoku instance with upper number limit set to 9 and an empty rules list.
    Sudoku(Board, int) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.Sudoku
    Constructs a Sudoku instance with an empty rules list.
    Sudoku(Board, int, List) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.Sudoku
    Constructs a Sudoku instance with given board, max allowed value, and rules.
    SudokuRule - Class in sudokusolver.sudoku
    Represents an abstract rule within the Sudoku domain.
    SudokuRule() - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.SudokuRule
     
    sudokusolver.csp - package sudokusolver.csp
    Implements generic mathematical abstractions required to model and solve CSPs (Constraint Satisfaction Problems).
    sudokusolver.csp.constraints - package sudokusolver.csp.constraints
    Contains classes extending the abstract Constraint class.
    sudokusolver.sudoku - package sudokusolver.sudoku
    Models the core domain, structural components, and high-level abstractions of a Sudoku puzzle.
    sudokusolver.sudoku.rules - package sudokusolver.sudoku.rules
    Contains classes extending the abstract SudokuRule class.
    sum - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.KillerCageRule
    The target sum
    SumConstraint - Class in sudokusolver.csp.constraints
    Enforces that the sum of the values assigned to the variables in its scope equals a specified target sum.
    SumConstraint(List, int) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.csp.constraints.SumConstraint
     

    T

    ThermoRule - Class in sudokusolver.sudoku.rules
    Enforces that the values in a specified list of cells form a "thermometer", meaning that the value in each cell must be strictly less than the value in the next cell in the list.
    ThermoRule(List) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.ThermoRule
     
    ThermoRule(Cell...) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.ThermoRule
     
    toBoard() - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.RegionSelector
    Uses '1'-'9' regions to create a Board where cells in '1' are set to 1, cells in '2' are set to 2, etc.
    toBoard(int) - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.RegionSelector
    Uses regions represeting numbers up to maxNumber to create a Board.
    topLeft - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.ClassicRule
    The top-left cell of the square where the rule applies.
    topLeft - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.DiagonalRule
    The top-left cell of the square region to which the rule applies.
    topLeft - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.RowsAndColumnsRule
    The top-left cell of the rectangle.
    toString() - Method in record class sudokusolver.csp.ValuePair
    Returns a string representation of this pair in the format Pair[first, second].
    toString() - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.Board
    Returns a string representation of the board.
    toString() - Method in record class sudokusolver.sudoku.Cell
    Returns the string representation of this cell instance.
    toString() - Method in record class sudokusolver.sudoku.Corner
    Returns a string representation of the corner, indicating its position.
    toString() - Method in record class sudokusolver.sudoku.Edge
    Returns a string representation of the edge, indicating its position and orientation.
    toString() - Method in class sudokusolver.sudoku.Sudoku
    Returns the string representation of the underlying board grid.
    toString(int, int) - Static method in record class sudokusolver.sudoku.Cell
    Static utility to generate a standardized cell string identifier without instantiating a Cell object.

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class sudokusolver.csp.PropagationResult
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    ValuePair - Record Class in sudokusolver.csp
    An immutable holder for a pair of primitive integer values.
    ValuePair(int, int) - Constructor for record class sudokusolver.csp.ValuePair
    Creates an instance of a ValuePair record class.
    values() - Static method in enum class sudokusolver.csp.PropagationResult
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    vEdges - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.XVRule
    The set of V edges (connecting cells that must sum to 5).

    W

    whiteDots - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.DotsRule
    Edges with white dots.
    width - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.DiagonalRule
    The width of the square region to which the rule applies.
    width - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.RowsAndColumnsRule
    The width of the rectangle.

    X

    xEdges - Variable in class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.XVRule
    The set of X edges (connecting cells that must sum to 10).
    XVRule - Class in sudokusolver.sudoku.rules
    Enforces that the values of cells connected by a V edge sum to 5, the values of cells connected by a X edge sum to 10, and the values of cells not connected by a V or X edge are don't sum to 5 or 10.
    XVRule(List, List) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.XVRule
     
    XVRule(List, List, List) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.XVRule
     
    XVRule(Set, Set, Set) - Constructor for class sudokusolver.sudoku.rules.XVRule
